styles.label: Clean glyph
styles.prompt: minimal vector glyph, simple geometric mark, balanced negative space, charcoal base with one sharp accent color

styles.label: Soft 3D
styles.prompt: soft 3D clay icon, rounded abstract forms, gentle studio lighting, compact and friendly without looking childish

styles.label: Glass icon
styles.prompt: translucent glassmorphism icon, crisp inner symbol, subtle refraction, clean depth, restrained blue green accent

styles.label: Pixel badge
styles.prompt: premium pixel-art badge, 32-bit style, readable blocky silhouette, limited palette, modern developer-tool feel

styles.label: Ink line
styles.prompt: monoline ink icon, expressive black linework, small accent fill, simple abstract agent signal, high legibility

styles.label: Paper cut
styles.prompt: layered paper-cut icon, crisp stacked shapes, soft shadow, warm neutral base with a bright teal accent, high contrast silhouette

styles.label: Blueprint
styles.prompt: technical blueprint emblem, precise line grid, subtle cyan ink on deep charcoal, schematic but simple, readable at small sizes

styles.label: Enamel sticker
styles.prompt: polished enamel sticker badge, bold flat shapes, thick clean outline, optimistic coral and mint accents, crisp app-icon finish

promptCases.expected:
Create a square app avatar for an AI agent named "Planning Agent".
Visual style: layered paper-cut icon.
Composition: one centered abstract agent mark, clean silhouette, readable at 32px, restrained palette, polished macOS developer-tool finish.
Do not include text, letters, watermarks, screenshots, people, or UI chrome.

Create a square app avatar for an AI agent named "fallback-agent".
Visual style: minimal vector glyph.
Composition: one centered abstract agent mark, clean silhouette, readable at 32px, restrained palette, polished macOS developer-tool finish.
Do not include text, letters, watermarks, screenshots, people, or UI chrome.

Create a square app avatar for an AI agent named "fallback-agent".
Visual style: minimal vector glyph, simple geometry, balanced negative space, one confident accent color.
Composition: one centered abstract agent mark, clean silhouette, readable at 32px, restrained palette, polished macOS developer-tool finish.
Do not include text, letters, watermarks, screenshots, people, or UI chrome.

Create a square app avatar for an AI agent named "Quote \"Agent\" \\ Lab".
Visual style: technical emblem.
Composition: one centered abstract agent mark, clean silhouette, readable at 32px, restrained palette, polished macOS developer-tool finish.
Do not include text, letters, watermarks, screenshots, people, or UI chrome.
